Services.title: What We Do Best
Services.subtitle: Building with Quality, responsibility and trust.
Services.renovationDesc: Office renovation, schools, houses, apartments and public buildings.
Services.maintenanceDesc: Repairs, painting, plumbing, masonry, concrete and finishing works.
Services.landscapingDesc: Fences, drainage, paving, gardens, external layouts.
Services.supervisionDesc: Formwork, reinforcement, concrete quality control and site coordination.

Team.title: Behind ECOSTRUCT, a Passionate Team
Team.subtitle: Collective expertise serving our clients — together, we are building Rwanda's future.
Team.footer: 👥 A growing team — new talents coming soon to serve you better.
Team.founderBio: 20+ years of experience in France, now leading construction excellence in Rwanda.
Team.japhetBio: Coordinating construction projects, site planning, and quality control across all operations.
Team.gercyBio: Overseeing on-site operations, quality assurance, and technical compliance for all construction projects.

Realisations.title: Projects & Realisations
Realisations.subtitle: Completed work and ongoing construction across Rwanda — built with precision, delivered with pride.
Realisations.partnerText: We are currently working on multiple projects with strategic partners.
Realisations.ecoleDesc: Full renovation of the French School in Kigali — modernised classrooms, administrative spaces, and outdoor facilities. Delivered on schedule to the highest standards.
Realisations.currentDesc: A new construction project currently underway across Rwanda. More details and progress updates will be shared soon.
Realisations.ctaText: Want to work with us on your next project?

Careers.title: Careers at
Careers.subtitle: Build Rwanda's future with us. We're looking for passionate people to shape tomorrow's construction landscape.
Careers.comingSoonDesc: We're preparing exciting opportunities to join our team.

Careers.notifySuccess: Thanks! We'll notify you when jobs are available.

Sustainability.description: At Eco-Struct Ltd, we believe construction should not only build today's projects — it should also protect tomorrow's environment.
Sustainability.vision: Unlike many traditional construction companies, our vision goes beyond building structures.
Sustainability.localMaterials: Use of local materials and local expertise
Sustainability.objectiveFooter: We aim to reduce the environmental impact of construction while creating durable, modern and efficient projects for future generations.
Sustainability.recyclingDesc: We encourage sorting, recycling and reusing construction materials whenever possible in order to reduce waste on our sites.
Sustainability.localMaterialsDesc: We prioritize local materials and local suppliers to support Rwanda's economy, reduce transport pollution, and promote sustainable development.
Sustainability.smarterConstructionDesc: Our projects are designed to combine quality, durability, energy efficiency, and environmental responsibility.
Sustainability.buildingForFutureDesc: Every project should contribute to a cleaner environment, a stronger community, and a better future for the next generations.
Sustainability.conclusionText: is committed to creating construction solutions that respect both people and nature.
Sustainability.footerNote: Every project should contribute to: a cleaner environment, a stronger community, and a better future for the next generations.

About.title: ECOSTRUCT – Your Trusted Partner in Rwanda
About.subtitle: Construction • Renovation • Electrical & Plumbing • Landscaping • Maintenance
About.description: ECOSTRUCT is a Rwandan company with proven expertise in construction, renovation, and technical facility management. We are trusted by international organizations, NGOs, and embassies, who have recognized our professionalism through official recommendation letters.
About.timelineBody1: With more than 20 years of experience in the construction industry in France, Ndemeye Gaius developed strong expertise, high standards and a passion for quality, sustainable and innovative construction.
About.timelineBody2: After many successful projects in France, he decided in 2024 to return to Rwanda with a clear purpose: to bring his knowledge, international experience and modern construction methods to his country.
About.timelineBody3: We are trusted by international organizations, NGOs, and embassies, who have recognized our professionalism through official recommendation letters.
About.humanValues: Focus on human values & client satisfaction
About.teamAtWorkDesc: Behind every project, a dedicated team ensuring quality and precision.
About.commitmentQuote: We don't just build structures – we build trust and long-lasting partnerships.
About.footerQuote: Building responsibly — respecting people, strengthening communities, and protecting our planet for future generations.

VideoTestimonial.title: Building Beyond Construction
VideoTestimonial.subtitle: ECOSTRUCT Rwanda is committed to empowering communities through education.
